products.name: Sweepza
products.vercel_status: custom apex/www serve app from Vercel; fresh prod deploy from origin/main (8c39db4, PR #45+#46) with live Stripe env; apex/www/health/public pages all HTTP 200
products.clerk_status: dedicated Sweepza DEVELOPMENT instance ins_3EhjrYiNBzhqkZlG9kIc2Gh4dSy (separate from E&E); auth E2E-proven (signup/signin/host-onboarding). Production instance + CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET are founder dashboard gates. On-demand app_user upsert covers signup without the webhook.
products.stripe_status: LIVE and configured. Account acct_1SpxXpDtcwz0cxzo (shared founder account) KYC COMPLETE: charges_enabled+payouts_enabled+details_submitted all true. Sweepza-namespaced live products/prices provisioned: baseline $19/mo price_1TqghWDtcwz0cxzoYtZp1XYv, add-on $5/mo price_1TqghWDtcwz0cxzogpcLYkdP; live webhook we_1TqghXDtcwz0cxzobypz5Rl9 -> https://sweepza.com/api/webhooks/stripe. Live keys+prices+whsec in Doppler prd + Vercel prod. Live money path proven: cs_live_ checkout session created (livemode true, $19 USD) and expired. Full checkout->webhook->subscription->entitlement->UI loop E2E-verified in test mode with identical code. Remaining: one real-card charge (founder).
products.resend_status: not activated (RESEND_API_KEY unset in prd, cleanly off). Founder gate: Resend account + API key + send.sweepza.com sending domain + DNS.
products.posthog_status: off (NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY unset in prd; no E&E pollution). Founder gate: create dedicated Sweepza PostHog project, then set key.
products.sentry_status: off (NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN unset in prd). Founder gate: create dedicated Sweepza Sentry project, then set DSN/auth token.
products.dns_status: GoDaddy authoritative DNS: apex A 216.150.1.1 and 216.150.16.1; www CNAME 8b91c0d2a92bd777.vercel-dns-017.com.; HTTPS 200; /api/health 200; cron 401 without bearer (CRON_SECRET active)
products.data_status: CLEAN. All synthetic rows removed with scoped predicates (14 dev-seed listings + 2 expired demo listings + 2 hosts + 2 subscriptions + 2 synthetic users). Zero real user/host/listing data existed. Owner bootstrap user (clerk_user_id dev_owner, is_owner) retained; note it is a placeholder Clerk id, so real founder admin access requires mapping his real Clerk user to is_owner/is_admin.
founder_gates: One real-card checkout on https://sweepza.com to prove live revenue (KYC already complete; money path live-configured)
Dedicated production Clerk instance (dashboard + clerk.sweepza.com DNS + OAuth secrets) to replace the dev instance
Dedicated Sweepza PostHog project (copy phc_ key + host)
Dedicated Sweepza Sentry project (copy DSN + auth token)
Resend account + API key + send.sweepza.com sending domain/DNS
Map founder's real Clerk user to is_owner/is_admin for production admin access
products.state: REVENUE PATH LIVE - AWAITING FOUNDER REAL-MONEY PROOF (Stripe live+KYC done, app deployed+healthy, data clean; prod Clerk/PostHog/Sentry/Resend are enhancement gates)
